title: Senior Teacher - Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates family as a Senior Teacher in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates:
Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Disha Publication Asia Pacific Associates!
